code: import{Line}from'react-chartjs-2';import{Chart as ChartJS,CategoryScale,LinearScale,PointElement,LineElement,Title,Tooltip,Filler,Legend}from'chart.js';import{motion}from'framer-motion';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";ChartJS.register(CategoryScale,LinearScale,PointElement,LineElement,Title,Tooltip,Filler,Legend);const SafetyScoreChart=()=>{const data={labels:['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat','Sun'],datasets:[{label:'Safety Score',data:[80,85,88,82,91,89,94],borderColor:'#ec4899',backgroundColor:'rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.1)',fill:true,tension:0.4,pointBackgroundColor:'#ec4899',pointBorderColor:'#fff',pointRadius:4,pointHoverRadius:6}]};const options={responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{backgroundColor:'#1f2937',titleColor:'#f9fafb',bodyColor:'#d1d5db'}},scales:{x:{grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'},ticks:{color:'#9ca3af'}},y:{min:70,max:100,grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'},ticks:{color:'#9ca3af'}}}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(motion.div,{initial:{opacity:0,y:20},animate:{opacity:1,y:0},transition:{delay:0.3},className:"backdrop-blur-lg bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-4",children:"Your Safety Trend"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Line,{data:data,options:options})]});};export default SafetyScoreChart;
